# FreeAudioTrim

> FreeAudioTrim is a browser-based collection of free audio tools focused on transcription, subtitles, captions, trimming, conversion, and other private audio workflows that run locally in the browser without file uploads.

Important notes:
- The core product workflow centers on audio and video transcription, subtitle generation, caption export, and subtitle preparation.
- The site emphasizes local in-browser processing, so privacy claims are based on files staying on the user's device during supported workflows.
- File support and performance can vary by browser decoding support, device memory, and device speed.
- Transcription, subtitle timing, and export quality can depend on the selected language, file length, and device capability.

## Core Tools
- [Audio to Text Converter](https://freeaudiotrim.com/audio-video-transcription-online.html): Transcribe audio or video into text, subtitles, captions, TXT, SRT, and VTT directly in the browser.
- [Arabic Audio and Video Transcription](https://freeaudiotrim.com/ar/audio-video-transcription-online.html): Arabic-localized transcription and subtitle workflow for users who want a dedicated Arabic interface.
- [Extract Audio from Video](https://freeaudiotrim.com/extract-audio-from-video.html): Extract audio tracks from video files before transcription, captioning, translation, or audio editing.
- [Audio Cutter](https://freeaudiotrim.com/audio-cutter-online.html): Trim audio files in the browser with waveform controls and local export.
- [MP3 Cutter](https://freeaudiotrim.com/free-mp3-cutter.html): Cut MP3 files online without uploading them to a server.
- [Audio Converter](https://freeaudiotrim.com/audio-converter.html): Convert common audio formats locally in the browser.

## Subtitle and Transcription Guides
- [How to Transcribe Audio to Text](https://freeaudiotrim.com/blog/how-to-transcribe-audio-to-text.html): Guide to converting spoken audio into editable text, transcripts, and subtitle-ready output.
- [How to Transcribe Video to Text](https://freeaudiotrim.com/blog/how-to-transcribe-video-to-text.html): Guide to extracting spoken content from video and turning it into text or subtitles.
- [How to Generate Subtitles](https://freeaudiotrim.com/blog/how-to-generate-subtitles.html): Guide to creating subtitle files such as SRT and VTT for captions and publishing workflows.

## Audio Editing Tools
- [Merge Audio Files](https://freeaudiotrim.com/merge-audio-files.html): Combine multiple audio files into one track.
- [Remove Silence](https://freeaudiotrim.com/remove-silence-from-audio.html): Detect and remove silent gaps from recordings.
- [Normalize Audio Volume](https://freeaudiotrim.com/normalize-audio-volume.html): Even out audio loudness for cleaner playback or processing.
- [Audio Speed Changer](https://freeaudiotrim.com/audio-speed-changer.html): Change playback speed without leaving the browser.
- [Audio Pitch Changer](https://freeaudiotrim.com/audio-pitch-changer.html): Adjust pitch for creative or corrective audio work.
- [MP3 to WAV](https://freeaudiotrim.com/convert-mp3-to-wav.html): Convert MP3 files into WAV format.
- [MP3 to M4R](https://freeaudiotrim.com/mp3-to-m4r.html): Convert MP3 files into iPhone ringtone format.
- [Ringtone Maker](https://freeaudiotrim.com/ringtone-maker.html): Prepare short audio clips for ringtone use.

## Optional
- [All Tools](https://freeaudiotrim.com/tools.html): Directory of FreeAudioTrim browser tools.
- [Blog](https://freeaudiotrim.com/blog/): Educational articles about audio editing, transcription, subtitles, and related workflows.
- [Contact](https://freeaudiotrim.com/contact.html): Contact and support page.
